openQuestions.text: What exact authenticated tools and JSON schemas does tools/list return?
openQuestions.note: The public server repository and skill text do not publish the authenticated inventory; run discovery after OAuth.

openQuestions.text: Does the installed mcp-remote version negotiate Mobbin Streamable HTTP and OAuth without extra flags?
openQuestions.note: The local Code Mode configuration pattern supports mcp-remote, but a Mobbin-authenticated smoke test remains required.

openQuestions.text: What exact Code Mode-prefixed tool name and schema should the packet call?
openQuestions.note: The logical public operation is search_screens; the mobbin.mobbin_search_screens name is a namespace convention that must be confirmed with search_tools/tool_info.

resolvedQuestions.answer: The official server is the hosted Streamable HTTP endpoint https://api.mobbin.com/mcp.
MCP uses OAuth/browser authorization with protected-resource metadata, DCR, PKCE S256, and openid; no static Mobbin API key belongs in the MCP manual.
Mobbin documents MCP availability for Pro, Team, and Enterprise; Free is not documented as eligible.
The official skills repo documents mobbin-search, whose concrete MCP operation is search_screens; app/screen/flow/element intent is expressed through query terms and visual inspection.
The skill install path is npx skills add mobbin/skills; the MCP prerequisite is the official remote URL.

Use a mobbin mcp manual with a mcp-remote stdio adapter to the official Streamable HTTP URL because the local Code Mode config shape validates stdio/sse rather than a direct Streamable HTTP transport.
The packet is a read-only Code Mode transport, forbids workspace mutation, and pairs with sk-design for design judgment.

keyFindings.text: Mobbin's official MCP server is remote Streamable HTTP at https://api.mobbin.com/mcp.
MCP uses browser OAuth; the Mobbin API key is a separate REST API credential and is not part of the MCP manual.
MCP access is documented for Pro, Team, and Enterprise, not Free.
mobbin-search documents search_screens with screen metadata, Mobbin/image URLs, platform, failed entries, and inline image blocks.
App, screen, flow, and element research are query dimensions in the published workflow; separate public tool names are not confirmed.
The official skill can be installed with npx skills add mobbin/skills or the documented manual clone/copy path.
The paste-ready UTCP shape is an mcp manual named mobbin using the repository's mcp-remote stdio adapter pattern for the official remote URL.
mcp-mobbin should be a non-mutating Code Mode transport and defer design judgment to sk-design.
Authenticated tools/list and one search_screens smoke call are implementation gates before freezing exact runtime names or schemas.

ruledOutDirections.reason: Official manifests publish a hosted remote endpoint and no local launch command.
Official MCP docs describe OAuth; API keys are documented for the separate REST API.
MCP docs list Pro, Team, and Enterprise and do not list Free.
The official skill publishes search_screens and query guidance, not four public tool schemas.
The optional .mobbin board flow is outside a read-only Code Mode transport.

ruledOutDirections.approach: Direct SSE declaration without Streamable HTTP verification
ruledOutDirections.reason: The official server metadata says streamable-http; use the local remote adapter until direct support is proven.
Public source does not expose authenticated tools/list schemas.

pivotsTaken: server manifests -> official docs -> official skills -> local Code Mode contract
